---
name: "Book change"
about: Track one independently valuable or reviewable change to the book
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

<!-- Please fill out the sections below. Remove any that don't apply. -->

## Objective

What should improve? A short, one-line description of the change or issue.

## Scope

Files, chapters, sections, figures, or tables included.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Text or layout change completed
- [ ] LaTeX compiles without new warnings
- [ ] Relevant pages visually checked
- [ ] Calculations, references, or citations verified

## Release note category

Choose one:

- [ ] `content-correction`
- [ ] `methodology`
- [ ] `clarification`
- [ ] `layout`
- [ ] `new-material`
- [ ] `internal` — excluded from reader-facing notes

## Out of scope

Related work that belongs in another issue.

## Issue size reminder

This issue is probably too large if it:

- changes several unrelated chapters;
- mixes statistical corrections with layout work;
- cannot be summarized in one sentence;
- needs more than roughly three acceptance-criteria groups;
- would be difficult to review in one sitting.

If so, split it into smaller issues before work starts.
